title: Peanut Butter Grilled Cheesecake
description: A rich and flaky peanut butter grilled cheesecake that's perfect for a whole30-friendly meal, featuring a dairy-free base and crunchy toppings.
instructions: Preheat your grill to medium-high heat.
Prepare the cheesecake base by combining Dairy-Free Cheesecake Base Mix with Honey in a mixing bowl. Stir until evenly combined and spreadable.
Pour the base mixture onto a parchment-lined baking sheet and press firmly into an even layer. Place it on a baking tray and keep warm while you prepare other ingredients.
In a separate bowl, mix Peanut Butter Ice Cream with Honey to create a peanut butter ice cream spread. Spread this evenly over the cheesecake base.
Meanwhile, melt Coconut Oil Chips in the microwave or over low heat until fully melted. Pour it over the ice cream layer and then add a generous amount of Peanut Butter Frosting Mix on top.

Place your cheesecake base with the ice cream on the grill for 5 minutes to warm up before putting under the broiler for another 3-4 minutes, or until golden brown. The heat will melt the Coconut Oil Chips and create a crispy layer atop.
Once done, allow it to cool for about 10 minutes before removing from the tray and serving. Enjoy this unique whole30-friendly dessert with your family!
Optional: You can add crushed peanuts as toppings for an extra crunchy texture.
